title: Solder Wire,0.8mm Soldering Wire Lead Free Sn99.3 Cu0.7 with Rosin Core for Electronic Electrical Soldering Components Repair and DIY. (20 G)
features: ★【Lead-free Solder Wire】lead-free solder wire with rosin core;Our solder wire is good solder ability both in electrical conductivity and thermal conductivity; The solder wire is made of high-quality materials, free of impurities, safe and reliable, and can be used for a long time.

★【Parameters】Electrical solder wire diameter is 0.032 inch (0.8mm), Flux content 2%, Net weight 12g Using matches can be melted and welded ,so that raise welding efficiency and quality. melting point range: 185°C - 190°C (365°F - 374°F)
★【Small Pack Design】Weld wire adopts a small design. You can put the solder wire pack on your pocket and Easy to carry and use.

★【Widely Applications】The alloy soldering wire is widely used in the repair of household appliances, you can repair household items such as Electronic Electrical / cell phone/headset / Remotes/ radio / audio / TV / Toys / circuit board / and other electrical devices.
★【After-sales service】 If you encounter any problems with our products, please contact us at any time, all your doubts will be replied in 24 hours.
description: Product Features: 1.This solder wire is synthesized from Tin-Cu rosin, we ensure that the tin content is 99.3%, lead free. 2.Less welding slag, bright solder joints. 3.Solder has good wettability, Strong solder joint. 4.With rosin flux, good fluidity, avoid cleaning after welding. Product Parameters: 1.Materials: Sn99.3%,Cu0.7%,Flux Rosin: 1.8-2% 2.Dimensions:5.5 x 5.5 x 2.9 cm/ 2.17 x 2.17 x 1.14 inches 3.Weight:20g 4.Packaging Size:5.5 x 5.5 x 2.9 cm/ 2.17 x 2.17 x 1.2 inches
